title: Consistent Fence Items
description: Remodels Fence items to represent only one block, similar to Wall blocks.
body:
Minecraft's fence items are strange in that they represent two fence blocks, even though wall blocks (at least on Java) represent a single block. This resource pack only changes the item model so that it more **accurately represents a single block**. This pack is compatible with my [Smooth Wood Products](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-wood-products) resource pack, providing smoother textures for wood fences and buttons. To use both, have this pack selected ABOVE the Smooth Wood Products pack.
